---
title: "Tutorial: Locate audio region corresponding to text, and align"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
lightbox: true
reference-location: margin
freeze: auto
cache: true
conda:
    environment: easywhisper
resources:
    ../_assets/tale_two_cities_ch01.txt
---


```{python}
import re
import requests

url = "https://www.gutenberg.org/cache/epub/98/pg98.txt"
full_text = requests.get(url).text

# Extract Chapter I text
match = re.search(
    r"(?<=CHAPTER I\.\r\nThe Period\r\n)[\s\S]+?(?=CHAPTER II\.)",
    full_text,
)
text = match.group().strip()
```
